MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Elijah Jones is present.
Attorney Matthew D. Show representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elizabeth Riles, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.505A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Dec. 17, 2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
